title: Official Reviews links please
wikitext:
[]: Official Reviews links please             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Wed Dec 30, 2020 5:31 pm Hello, when official press reviews are in, spoiler free or not, if people find them, can they post a link here please. Curious to see what the reviews are gonna be like.......masterpiece? Flop? Unfulfilling? A film that will forever be known as a great? Curious what the critics will think......

[]: Re: Official Reviews links please             Quote Post by IsAnnoGodOrATroll » Wed Dec 30, 2020 11:43 pm Yeah, I hope so too! I wonder if there will be a critics' screening first. If there isn't, which I'm inclined to believe since I did not find any Japanese critics reviews regarding 3.0 on release date or before it. But maybe that's just me not researching into it not enough! Nevertheless, I hope the reviews are positive and matches the enthusiasm for 2.0, or shock to fuel enough discussions like EOE! Though I do hope the reception will be pretty positive in that shock aspect too. Fascination for it will work too! Also hello! I'm new to the forum but this will be my first introduction to the discussion about the series! I've been mostly just observing and I think I will continue that mostly but I will try to be helpful to the discussion sometime!
